TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Sadipongan, title = Sadipongan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sadipongan} }

S.FORM: == Pangangan 三間屋名稱由來 == Sadipongan a niyaro', Tahapinangan 特色 Tamdaw 人口 Itiniay i Changbin Cen no Taitung ko Sadipongan a niyaro', 114 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 254 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 38% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 97 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 62% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 157 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis36%, roma2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Pitooran 信仰 O finacadan no Yincomi 所屬阿美族群
S.PHON: == paŋaŋan ******* == saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a nijaro~uʡ, taħapinaŋan ** tamɬ~ɮaw ** itiniaj i ʦħaŋb~b~vin ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis**%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. pito~uo~uran ** o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umi ******
S.FORM: == Pangangan 三間屋名稱由來 == Sadipongan a niyaro', Tahapinangan 特色 Tamdaw 人口 Itiniay i Changbin Cen no Taitung ko Sadipongan a niyaro', 114 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 254 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 38% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 97 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 62% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 157 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis36%, roma2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Pitooran 信仰 O finacadan no Yincomi 所屬阿美族群
S.PHON: == paŋaŋan ******* == saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a nijaro~uʡ, taħapinaŋan ** tamɬ~ɮaw ** itiniaj i ʦħaŋb~b~vin ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u saɬ~ɮipo~uŋan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis**%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. pito~uo~uran ** o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umi ******
